title: Raw Kale Glow
description: A refreshing and paleo-friendly dish featuring raw kale, carrots, and red onion for a peppery, silky texture that adds warmth to your meal.
instructions: Slice the kale leaves and red onion into thin strips.
Peel and julienne the carrots for a finer texture when cooked.
Heat 1 tbsp of avocado oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add salt, pepper, and sliced red onion to the pan, stirring occasionally until they start to soften.
Gently add kale leaves to the pan and cook until wilted but still crisp, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
Toss cooked kale with the sautéed onions and carrots in a bowl.
